        exact Nat.le_max_left _ _) _))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height :=
      lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by
        exact Nat.le_max_right _ _) _))
    have hsum : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height :=
      Nat.add_lt_add h1 h2
    have hsum' : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hsum
    have hmain : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        have : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
          exact Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp ?_
        · simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this
      ·
        have : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
          exact lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ hsum') (Nat.le_of_eq rfl)
        simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm] using
          (lt_of_lt_of_eq (by
            simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using (Nat.succ_lt_succ hsum')) (by
            simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm]))
    simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using hmain

have h1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by exact Nat.zero_le 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
    have h2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by exact Nat.zero_le 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
    have ihl' : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) :=
      lt_of_lt_of_le ihl h1
    have ihr' : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) :=
      lt_of_lt_of_le ihr h2
    have hs : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact Nat.add_lt_add ihl' ihr'
    have hs' : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using hs
    have hs'' : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact Nat.succ_lt_succ hs
    have hs''' : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, two_mul] using hs''
    simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using hs'''
  }

end BST1

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right ?_ (Nat.le_max_left _ _)))
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right ?_ (Nat.le_max_right _ _)))
    have hs : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height :=
      Nat.add_lt_add h1 h2
    have hs' : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      simpa [two_mul, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using hs
    have hpow : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      simp [pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm]
    have : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_lt_succ hs') (Nat.le_of_eq rfl)
    simpa [Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm, hpow] using this

have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have := ihl
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (pow_le_pow_right' (by
        exact Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by simp) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)) _)
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have := ihr
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le this (pow_le_pow_right' (by
        exact Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by simp) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)) _)
    have hsum : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height :=
      Nat.add_lt_add h1 h2
    have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using hsum
      exact Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff.mp (by
        simpa [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this)
    simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.add_assoc] using this

have ht1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by simp) (le_max_left _ _) _
    have ht2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by simp) (le_max_right _ _) _
    have h1 : t₁.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := lt_of_lt_of_le ihl ht1
    have h2 : t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := lt_of_lt_of_le ihr ht2
    have hs : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height :=
      add_lt_add h1 h2
    have hs' : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      simpa [two_mul, add_comm, add_left_comm, add_assoc] using hs
    have hpow : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      simp [pow_succ, mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc]
    have hsumlt : 1 + (t₁.size + t₂.size) < 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      exact Nat.succ_lt_of_lt hs'
    simpa [add_assoc, hpow] using hsumlt
  }

end BST1

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1 := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le ihl (pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (le_max_left _ _))
      exact Nat.le_pred_of_lt this
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1 := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact lt_of_lt_of_le ihr (pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (le_max_right _ _))
      exact Nat.le_pred_of_lt this
    have hsum : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) - 1 := by
      have hsum' : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 1 + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1) + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1) := by
        nlinarith [h1, h2]
      have : 1 + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1) + (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) - 1)
            = 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) - 1 := by
        nlinarith
      simpa [this] using hsum'
    have hpow : 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) := by
      simp [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc]
    have : 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) - 1 < 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) := by
      exact Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
        have : (2 : Nat) * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) ≠ 0 := by
          exact Nat.mul_ne_zero (by decide) (pow_ne_zero _ (by decide))
        exact this)) (by decide)
    have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) := by
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt hsum this
    simpa [hpow, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_assoc] using this

calc
      1 + t₁.size + t₂.size
          < 1 + (2 ^ t₁.height) + (2 ^ t₂.height) := by
              nlinarith
      _ ≤ 2 * (2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              have h1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
                exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (le_max_left _ _)
              have h2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
                exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (le_max_right _ _)
              nlinarith
      _ = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              simp [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc]
  }

calc
      1 + t₁.size + t₂.size
          < 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height := by
            nlinarith
      _ ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
            have h1 : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) :=
              pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
            have h2 : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) :=
              pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
            have hsum : 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              nlinarith
            have hpos : 0 < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              exact pow_pos (by decide) _
            have : 1 + 2 ^ t₁.height + 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 * 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
              have : 1 ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := Nat.succ_le_iff.mp hpos
              nlinarith
            simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using this
  }

end BST1

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
      have hm : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide : 0 < 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
      exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this hm |> Nat.le_of_lt
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
      have hm : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide : 0 < 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
      exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this hm |> Nat.le_of_lt
    have hs : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.add_le_add h1 h2) 1
    have : 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)
        < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simp [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm]
    exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt hs this
  }

end BST1

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
      exact le_trans (le_of_lt this) (pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
      exact le_trans (le_of_lt this) (pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide) (le_max_right _ _))
    have hs : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) := by
      nlinarith
    have hp : 2 * (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)) < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simp [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.lt_irrefl]
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt hs (by simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc] using hp)

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
      exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt this) hpow
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt this) hpow
    have hsum : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact Nat.add_add_add_comm 1 t₁.size t₂.size ▸ Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.add_le_add h1 h2) 1
    have hlt : 1 + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simpa [pow_succ, Nat.mul_add, Nat.add_mul, Nat.mul_one, Nat.one_mul, Nat.two_mul] using
        (Nat.lt_succ_self (2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height)))
    exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt hsum hlt

have hb1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
      exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt this) hpow
    have hb2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        exact pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
      exact Nat.le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt this) hpow
    have hsum : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact Nat.add_lt_add_of_le_of_lt hb1 (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt hb2 (Nat.lt_succ_self _))
    have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 * (2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using
        Nat.add_lt_add_left (Nat.add_lt_add_of_le_of_lt hb1 (Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt hb2 (Nat.lt_succ_self _))) 1
    simpa [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_comm, two_mul, Nat.add_assoc] using this

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt ihl) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.le_max_left _ _))
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      exact le_trans (Nat.le_of_lt ihr) (Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_right (by decide) (Nat.le_max_right _ _))
    have hsum : t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have hsumle : t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) :=
        Nat.add_le_add h1 h2
      have hdouble : 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) + 2 ^ (max t₁.height t₂.height) = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        simpa [Nat.pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc, Nat.two_mul]
      have : t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        simpa [hdouble] using hsumle
      exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt this (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
    exact Nat.succ_lt_succ hsum

nlinarith [Nat.pow_pos (by decide : (0:Nat) < 2) (max t₁.height t₂.height),
      ihl, ihr,
      Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_left t₁.height t₂.height),
      Nat.pow_le_pow_of_le_left (by decide : (0:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_right t₁.height t₂.height)]

have h1 : t₁.size ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have : t₁.size < 2 ^ t₁.height := ihl
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₁.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        exact pow_le_pow_right' (by decide : (2:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_left _ _)
      exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this hpow |>.le
    have h2 : t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
      have : t₂.size < 2 ^ t₂.height := ihr
      have hpow : 2 ^ t₂.height ≤ 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        exact pow_le_pow_right' (by decide : (2:Nat) ≤ 2) (Nat.le_max_right _ _)
      exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le this hpow |>.le
    have hsum : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size < 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
      have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
        have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 1 + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height + 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height := by
          exact Nat.add_le_add_left (Nat.add_le_add h1 h2) 1
        simpa [two_mul, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_left_comm, Nat.add_comm] using this
      have hpow : 2 * 2 ^ max t₁.height t₂.height = 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        simp [pow_succ, Nat.mul_comm, Nat.mul_left_comm, Nat.mul_assoc]
      have : 1 + t₁.size + t₂.size ≤ 2 ^ (1 + max t₁.height t₂.height) := by
        simpa [hpow] using this
      exact Nat.lt_of_le_of_lt this (Nat.lt_succ_self _)
    simpa using hsum
  }

end BST1
